expectations.text: Confirms ESRS 2 General Disclosures are mandatory regardless of DMA
expectations.evidence: States "ESRS 2 General Disclosures (mandatory, no materiality opt-out)"

expectations.text: Lists key E1 disclosures including Scope 1/2/3 GHG and transition plan (E1-1)
expectations.evidence: Lists E1-1 through E1-9, includes Scope 1/2/3 all 15 categories, energy mix

expectations.text: Notes E1-1 transition plan is legally required under Art. 19a even if climate were non-material
expectations.evidence: Explicitly states "transition plan (E1-1) is legally required under Art. 19a(2)(a)"

expectations.text: Lists key S1 disclosures including gender pay gap and LTIFR
expectations.evidence: Lists S1-16 gender pay gap, S1-14 LTIFR, collective bargaining, CEO pay ratio

expectations.text: States non-material topics require a materiality statement but not full disclosure
expectations.evidence: States non-material topics need brief materiality statement in ESRS 2 SBM-3/IRO-1
